title: Coreosma odorata
taxonomy: Coreosma odorata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Myoporaceae, which is a family of flowering plants native to Australia and New Zealand. This family is part of the larger order Asterales, which is a division of flowering plants that also includes the families Asteraceae, Campanulaceae, and Goodeniaceae. The Myoporaceae family is characterized by its small, delicate flowers and woody, shrub-like habit. Coreosma odorata is a specific species within this family, known for its distinctive characteristics and distribution. By understanding the classification of Coreosma odorata, we can better appreciate its unique position within the plant kingdom.
